title: cornutia grandifolia f. quadrangularis
intro: Cornutia grandifolia f. quadrangularis, also known as the quadrangular Cornutia, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Brazil and other parts of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cornutia grandifolia f. quadrangularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
